auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Amara API key sent with the x-api-key header. Generate it from the bottom of your Amara account page as described at https://apidocs.amara.org/.

actions.name: add_subtitle_note
actions.description: Add a subtitle note for a specific video and subtitle language.

inputSchema.description: Input for adding an Amara subtitle note.

created.description: The ISO timestamp when the note was created.

outputSchema.description: Output for adding an Amara subtitle note.

actions.name: add_video_url
actions.description: Add a new source URL to an existing Amara video.

primary.description: Whether to set the new URL as the primary URL.

inputSchema.description: Input for adding an Amara video URL.

primary.description: Whether this URL is the primary URL.

original.description: Whether this URL is the original URL.

resourceUri.description: The resource URI for the video URL.

outputSchema.description: Output for adding an Amara video URL.

actions.name: create_subtitle_language
actions.description: Create a new subtitle language track for an Amara video.

language.description: The subtitle language code to add.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating an Amara subtitle language.

outputSchema.description: Output for creating an Amara subtitle language.

actions.name: create_subtitles
actions.description: Create a new subtitle version for a specific video and language.

subtitlesUrl.description: The URL to a subtitle file.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating Amara subtitles. Exactly one of subtitles or subtitlesUrl is required.

outputSchema.description: Output for creating Amara subtitles.

actions.name: create_video
actions.description: Create a new Amara video from a source URL and title, with optional metadata.

team.description: The team slug to assign the video to.

project.description: The project slug to assign the video to.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating an Amara video.

outputSchema.description: Output for creating an Amara video.

actions.name: delete_video_url
actions.description: Delete a source URL from an existing Amara video.

inputSchema.description: Input for an Amara video URL action.

outputSchema.description: Output for deleting an Amara video URL.

actions.name: fetch_subtitles_data
actions.description: Fetch subtitle data for a specific video and language in JSON, SRT, or VTT format.

inputSchema.description: Input for fetching Amara subtitles.

start.description: The subtitle start time in seconds.

end.description: The subtitle end time in seconds.

subtitles.description: The parsed subtitle segments for JSON responses.

anyOf.description: The raw subtitle text for text-based responses.

outputSchema.description: Output for fetching Amara subtitles.

actions.name: get_activity
actions.description: Fetch a single Amara activity item by activity ID.

inputSchema.description: Input for fetching an Amara activity.

outputSchema.description: Output for fetching an Amara activity.

actions.name: get_subtitle_language_details
actions.description: Fetch a single subtitle language track for an Amara video.

inputSchema.description: Input for an Amara video language action.

outputSchema.description: Output for fetching an Amara subtitle language.

actions.name: get_team_details
actions.description: Fetch a single Amara team by team slug.

inputSchema.description: Input for fetching an Amara team.

outputSchema.description: Output for fetching an Amara team.

actions.name: get_team_languages
actions.description: Fetch preferred and blacklisted language codes for a single Amara team.

inputSchema.description: Input for fetching Amara team languages.

outputSchema.description: Output for fetching Amara team languages.

actions.name: get_user
actions.description: Fetch a single Amara user by username or user ID.

userIdentifier.description: The Amara username or user ID.

inputSchema.description: Input for fetching an Amara user.

anyOf.description: The user's full name, if present.
The user's display name, if present.

isActive.description: Whether the user is currently active.

outputSchema.description: Output for fetching an Amara user.

actions.name: get_user_activity
actions.description: List activity items for a specific Amara user.

identifier.description: The Amara username, `me`, or user ID.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing Amara user activity.

created.description: The ISO timestamp when the activity happened.

date.description: The ISO timestamp when the activity happened.

anyOf.description: The activity type code.
The activity type name.

type.description: The activity type code or name.

anyOf.description: The activity type display name.
The related video title or identifier.
The related language code, if present.
The URL for the next page, or null.
The URL for the previous page, or null.

outputSchema.description: Output for listing Amara activity.

actions.name: get_user_data
actions.description: Fetch a single Amara user by username, `me`, or user ID.

identifier.description: The Amara username, `me`, or user ID.

inputSchema.description: Input for fetching Amara user data.

outputSchema.description: Output for fetching Amara user data.

actions.name: get_video
actions.description: Fetch a single Amara video by video ID.

inputSchema.description: Input for an Amara video action.

outputSchema.description: Output for fetching an Amara video.

actions.name: get_video_url
actions.description: Fetch a single Amara video URL entry by video ID and URL ID.

inputSchema.description: Input for an Amara video URL action.

primary.description: Whether this URL is the primary URL.

original.description: Whether this URL is the original URL.

resourceUri.description: The resource URI for the video URL.

outputSchema.description: Output for fetching an Amara video URL.

actions.name: get_video_url_details
actions.description: Look up Amara metadata for a public or embeddable video URL.

url.description: The public or embeddable video URL.

inputSchema.description: Input for looking up an Amara video URL.

outputSchema.description: Output for looking up an Amara video URL.

actions.name: list_activity
actions.description: List Amara activity items with optional team, video, language, and date filters.

team.description: The team slug to filter by.

after.description: Only include activity after this ISO timestamp.

before.description: Only include activity before this ISO timestamp.

video.description: The video ID to filter by.

language.description: The language code to filter by.

teamActivity.description: Whether to request team-level activity instead of team video activity.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing Amara activity.

created.description: The ISO timestamp when the activity happened.

date.description: The ISO timestamp when the activity happened.

anyOf.description: The activity type code.
The activity type name.

type.description: The activity type code or name.

anyOf.description: The activity type display name.
The related video title or identifier.
The related language code, if present.
The URL for the next page, or null.
The URL for the previous page, or null.

outputSchema.description: Output for listing Amara activity.

actions.name: list_available_languages
actions.description: List the languages supported by the Amara API.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for this action.

name.description: The display name of the language.

outputSchema.description: Output for listing Amara languages.

actions.name: list_languages
actions.description: List the languages supported by the Amara API.

inputSchema.description: No input is required for this action.

name.description: The display name of the language.

outputSchema.description: Output for listing Amara languages.

actions.name: list_subtitle_actions
actions.description: List the subtitle workflow actions available for a specific video and language.

inputSchema.description: Input for an Amara video language action.

label.description: The display label for the action.

anyOf.description: Whether the action is completed.

actions.description: The available subtitle actions.

outputSchema.description: Output for listing Amara subtitle actions.

actions.name: list_subtitle_languages
actions.description: List all subtitle language tracks for a single Amara video.

inputSchema.description: Input for an Amara video action.

published.description: Whether the subtitle language is published.

subtitlesComplete.description: Whether the subtitle language is marked complete.

isPrimaryAudioLanguage.description: Whether this is the primary audio language.

anyOf.description: The URL for the next page, or null.
The URL for the previous page, or null.

outputSchema.description: Output for listing Amara subtitle languages.

actions.name: list_subtitle_notes
actions.description: List all subtitle notes for a specific video and subtitle language.

inputSchema.description: Input for an Amara video language action.

created.description: The ISO timestamp when the note was created.

outputSchema.description: Output for listing Amara subtitle notes.

actions.name: list_teams
actions.description: List the Amara teams accessible to the current API key with pagination controls.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing Amara teams.

anyOf.description: The team description, if present.
The team visibility setting.
The video visibility setting.
The URL for the next page, or null.
The URL for the previous page, or null.

outputSchema.description: Output for listing Amara teams.

actions.name: list_video_activity
actions.description: List activity items for a single Amara video with pagination controls.

inputSchema.description: Input for a paginated Amara video child collection.

created.description: The ISO timestamp when the activity happened.

date.description: The ISO timestamp when the activity happened.

anyOf.description: The activity type code.
The activity type name.

type.description: The activity type code or name.

anyOf.description: The activity type display name.
The related video title or identifier.
The related language code, if present.
The URL for the next page, or null.
The URL for the previous page, or null.

outputSchema.description: Output for listing Amara activity.

actions.name: list_video_urls
actions.description: List all source URLs associated with a single Amara video.

inputSchema.description: Input for a paginated Amara video child collection.

primary.description: Whether this URL is the primary URL.

original.description: Whether this URL is the original URL.

resourceUri.description: The resource URI for the video URL.

urls.description: The list of video URL entries.

anyOf.description: The URL for the next page, or null.
The URL for the previous page, or null.

outputSchema.description: Output for listing Amara video URLs.

actions.name: list_videos
actions.description: List Amara videos with optional filters, sorting, and pagination controls.

team.description: The team slug to filter by.

owner.description: The owner username to filter by.

project.description: The project slug to filter by.

language.description: The language code to filter by.

archive.description: Whether to return archived videos only.

videoId.description: A comma-separated list of video IDs to filter by.

videoUrl.description: A source video URL to filter by.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing Amara videos.

anyOf.description: The video description, if present.
The owning team slug, if present.
The owning project slug, if present.
The primary audio language code.

created.description: The ISO timestamp when the video was created.

allUrls.description: All source URLs attached to the video.

anyOf.description: The URL for the next page, or null.
The URL for the previous page, or null.

outputSchema.description: Output for listing Amara videos.

actions.name: make_video_url_primary
actions.description: Update a video URL entry and mark it as the primary URL when requested.

primary.description: Whether the URL should become the primary URL.

inputSchema.description: Input for making an Amara video URL primary.

primary.description: Whether this URL is the primary URL.

original.description: Whether this URL is the original URL.

resourceUri.description: The resource URI for the video URL.

outputSchema.description: Output for making an Amara video URL primary.

actions.name: perform_subtitle_action
actions.description: Perform a subtitle workflow action such as publish, approve, or reject.

action.description: The subtitle workflow action to perform.

inputSchema.description: Input for performing an Amara subtitle action.

outputSchema.description: Output for performing an Amara subtitle action.

actions.name: send_message
actions.description: Send a message to an Amara user or team recipient.

user.description: The target username or user ID.

inputSchema.description: Input for sending an Amara message. Exactly one of user or team is required.

outputSchema.description: Output for sending an Amara message.

actions.name: update_subtitle_language
actions.description: Update subtitle language settings such as completion flags and soft limits.

softLimitCpl.description: The soft limit for characters per line.

softLimitCps.description: The soft limit for characters per second.

softLimitLines.description: The soft limit for subtitle lines.

softLimitMaxDuration.description: The soft limit for maximum subtitle duration in milliseconds.

softLimitMinDuration.description: The soft limit for minimum subtitle duration in milliseconds.

isPrimaryAudioLanguage.description: Whether this is the primary audio language.

inputSchema.description: Input for updating an Amara subtitle language.

outputSchema.description: Output for updating an Amara subtitle language.

actions.name: update_video
actions.description: Update an existing Amara video's metadata, assignment, or language settings.

team.description: The team slug to assign the video to.

project.description: The project slug to assign the video to.

inputSchema.description: Input for updating an Amara video.

outputSchema.description: Output for updating an Amara video.

actions.name: view_video_details
actions.description: Fetch a single Amara video by video ID.

inputSchema.description: Input for an Amara video action.

outputSchema.description: Output for fetching an Amara video.
